name: Basic Cheesecake Method & Toppings
recipeInstructions:
1. Let cream cheese sit out until it reaches room temperature, becoming soft and pliable.
2. Beat the cream cheese with sugar together until fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time (break them into a separate cup; even a tiny bit of shell will ruin the mixture) and beat just until combined.
4. Add remaining ingredients and beat just until combined.
5. Pour batter into chilled shell and bake at 325°F for 50 minutes to an hour.
6. Jam may be melted and poured evenly over the cooled cake.
7. Fruits may be arranged on top of a cooled cake, then covered with a melted jam glaze.
8. Chocolate or white chocolate chips (melted with 2-3 tbsp butter and optionally 1-2 tbsp whipping cream) can be poured on top of the cooled cake.
9. For a yogurt or sour cream topping, cook the cake for only 50 minutes, cool it for 15 minutes, mix together 1 cup yogurt or sour cream with 1/4 cup sugar (regular is acceptable), and 1 tbsp vanilla or other flavoring (lemon juice, extract, etc.). Raise the oven temperature to 475°F and bake another 10 minutes.
